Exports a function to require the "message_keys" module or throw an error if not found.

# Purpose
This code is a module export function that dynamically requires and returns a specified module based on the input parameter. It provides narrow functionality by handling module imports through a switch statement. If the input `module` is `"message_keys"`, it returns the result of `require("message_keys")`. If the input does not match any case, it throws an error indicating that the module is not found. This pattern is useful for conditionally loading modules at runtime.
